title: Nvidia Optimized
description: A performance modpack made for Nvidia GPUs
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHNAw2Bk/images/4238e9e5fa52be3fdc1c39cae8912febd8533add.png)
##

### A Performance Modpack exclusively for Nvidia GPUs
![In Game Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7341a179597a36f4d9ddd27fb672ea282e66fe.webp)

This modpack gave us a **300fps** increase over Fabulously Optimized...

## 

### Juicy Performance
Blazing fast performance for no good reason. Seriously, just download it and watch your framerate climb

### Modern Standards
It supports everything you want except shaders, due to limitations of Nvidium (the life and soul of this modpack)

### _Mostly_  Bug Free
Testing hasn't revealed any weird issues and glitches with this modpack, many of these mods are tried and true not to fry your game, but keep in mind Nvidium is in Alpha

### Flex Your GPU
Flex your #TeamGreen status on those team blue and red plebs lol

### Now with Distant Horizons!
Use the power of FOSS to have the render distance all those Instagram Reels have. **Note: You must download the beta "DH" build for this mod**
